word: H4520 - מְנַשִּׁי - Mᵉnashshîy - men-ash-shee' - Of Manasseh

sections.paragraph:
Original: מנשּׁי

Transliteration: menashshı̂y

Phonetic: men-ash-shee'

BDB Definition:

Manassites = Manasseh " causing to forget"
  1. descendants of Manasseh, son of Joseph and grandson of Jacob
    1. specifically used only of that half that lived east of the Jordan

Origin: from H4519

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
